leads.noLeadsFilter: Try adjusting your search or filters.
leads.noLeadsWebhook: Leads will appear here once your Facebook webhook is configured.
leads.syncDesc: Pull leads from a specific Facebook Lead Form via Graph API. Only leads from the last N hours are synced (duplicates skipped).
leads.noConnectedPages: No connected pages. Add one in
leads.noFormsFound: No forms found for this page yet.
leads.hoursBackHint: Example: 1, 10, 24. We will stop syncing once we reach older leads.
leads.hoursBackPositive: Hours back must be greater than 0

dialog.addSubtitle: Choose where your leads should be sent

validation.invalidJson: Body template is not valid JSON. Check for syntax errors.

form.templateVarsSubtitle: Click a tag to copy. Paste into the JSON body, form fields, or headers.
form.bodyHintSuffix: for dynamic values. Body must be valid JSON.
form.headersEmptyHint: Content-Type is set from your selection above. Add Authorization or other headers here if needed.
form.variableFieldsHint: Filled per Lead Routing rule (e.g. offer_id, stream). Press Enter or comma to add.
form.testSaveFirstTitle: Save this destination first to run a test
form.testDescReady: Sends a sample lead payload to your endpoint and shows the response.
form.testDescLocked: Save this destination first, then you can send a sample request to verify the integration.

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitlePrefix: Link Facebook to sync pages and receive lead webhooks — then route in
connections.howSubtitle: Secure Facebook login; we subscribe your pages for lead webhooks.
connections.howStep1: Tap Connect Facebook — a popup opens with Facebook's official login.
connections.howStep2: After you approve, we pull pages you manage (including Business Manager) and register webhooks.
connections.howStep3Suffix: to route each page to Telegram, affiliate, or custom destinations.
connections.noAccountsBody: Connect once — we'll list your pages so you can enable lead delivery per page.
connections.popupBlocked: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
connections.oauthTimedOut: Facebook connection timed out. Please try again.
connections.removePageBodyPrefix: {{name}} will stop receiving leads in Targenix.

landing.heroSubtitle: Connect your Facebook Lead Ads to any platform. Every lead captured, routed, and delivered in real time — without lifting a finger.
landing.trustMicro: No credit card required · Free to start · Official Meta Webhooks API
landing.valueProp2Desc: AES-256-CBC at rest + HTTPS in transit.
landing.howSubtitle: From zero to automated lead delivery in minutes. No code required.
landing.step1Desc: Link your Facebook account and pages in one click. We handle OAuth, tokens, and subscriptions automatically.
landing.step2Desc: Set up where your leads should go — any CRM, affiliate network, Telegram, or custom endpoint. Full control.
landing.step3Desc: Every new lead is instantly delivered. Real-time webhook processing, automatic retries, zero manual work.
landing.availableTitle: Everything you can use right now
landing.availableSubtitle: No "vaporware". These features are already live in the product — built for speed, reliability, and clarity.
landing.feat1Desc: We receive leadgen events instantly and process them asynchronously to avoid retries.
landing.feat2Desc: Send leads to Telegram and affiliate / custom endpoints based on your rules and templates.
landing.feat3Desc: System chat + delivery chats + per-destination delivery mapping with full control.
landing.feat4Desc: Pipeline statuses, delivery outcomes, retries, and structured logs for debugging.
landing.feat5Desc: Failed deliveries retry automatically (up to 3 times) so leads don't get lost.
landing.feat6Desc: Encrypted tokens, signature verification, and per-user data isolation.
landing.roadmapSubtitle: These are in progress and will ship step-by-step. We'll keep the product stable while adding power features.
landing.road1Desc: Bitrix24, amoCRM, HubSpot (and more) with guided setup and field mapping.
landing.road2Desc: Invite teammates, set access levels, and manage multi-operator workflows.
landing.road3Desc: Round-robin, schedules, quotas, and per-campaign smart rules for scale.
landing.road4Desc: WhatsApp / SMS alerts, plus multi-chat fallbacks for critical deliveries.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to automate lead flow
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built for marketers and agencies who need reliability, speed, and full control.
landing.featA1Desc: Leads arrive and are sent within seconds via webhook. No polling, no delays — pure real-time.
landing.featA2Desc: Get notified the moment a lead comes in — directly to your Telegram with full lead details.
landing.featA3Desc: Send leads to any CRM, affiliate network, or custom endpoint. If it has an API, we can route to it.
landing.featA4Desc: Tokens encrypted with AES-256-CBC, X-Hub-Signature-256 verified on every request, data isolated per user.
landing.featA5Desc: Track every lead, every order, every delivery in your dashboard. Real-time stats and detailed logs.
landing.featA6Desc: Failed deliveries are retried automatically up to 3 times. Nothing slips through the cracks.
landing.trust1: Built on official Meta Webhooks API
landing.trust3: Real-time processing — leads delivered in under 1 second
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to automate your lead flow?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join businesses already using Targenix to capture and deliver every Facebook lead automatically.

telegram.title: Telegram Settings
telegram.subtitle: Connect Telegram and manage delivery chats for lead notifications.
telegram.notificationsDesc: Connect your Telegram account to receive lead notifications instantly
telegram.connectStep1: Click the button below — Telegram opens
telegram.connectStep2: Press Start in the Telegram chat
telegram.waitingConnection: Waiting for connection… this page refreshes automatically every 5 seconds.
telegram.connectHint: Click the button → Telegram opens → Press Start → Done
telegram.deliveryChatsDesc: Add a Telegram group/channel for lead delivery (leads will NOT go to your system chat)
telegram.deliveryStep1: Add the bot to your group/channel
telegram.deliveryStep3: The bot will post the Chat ID in that chat
telegram.deliveryStep4: Paste the Chat ID below and link
telegram.deliveryMappingDesc: Choose Auto (one chat for all) or Manual (map each destination).
telegram.deliveryMappingDisabledDesc: Add at least one delivery chat first — then you can map destinations/templates to chats.
telegram.deliveryMappingDisabledBody: Mapping is disabled until you link a delivery chat in the section above.
telegram.disconnectBody1: This will remove all Telegram data from your account:
telegram.disconnectBody2: After disconnecting, leads will stop delivering to Telegram until you connect again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update your personal account details.
profile.name: Name
profile.nameDesc: Your display name in the dashboard.
profile.emailDesc: Change your login email. Only available for email/password accounts.
profile.socialLoginNote: This account uses a social login method, so email can't be changed here.
profile.passwordDesc: Update your password. Only available for email/password accounts.
profile.socialPasswordNote: This account uses a social login method, so password can't be changed here.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect Facebook forms to destinations via Lead Routing rules
integrations.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, page, form, destination…
integrations.createRoutingBody: Map a Facebook page and form to a destination (Sotuvchi, 100k, custom API, or admin template).
integrations.noMatchBody: Try adjusting your search or filters
integrations.deleteDialogBody: This integration will stop forwarding leads.
